label: build all
command: cd drivers; if ($?) { cargo build }; if ($?) { cd .. }; if ($?) { cargo run -p xtask }

label: no dbg full chain
command: cd drivers; if ($?) { cargo build }; if ($?) { cd .. }; if ($?) { cargo run -p xtask }; if ($?) { & 'C:/Program Files/qemu/qemu-system-x86_64.exe' -m 8G -cpu 'qemu64,+apic,+acpi' -machine q35 -accel 'whpx' -smp 1 -device 'intel-iommu,intremap=off' -bios 'C:/Program Files/qemu/OVMF_X64.fd' -vga std -drive 'file=target/debug/boot.img,format=raw' -drive 'file=rustOS.vhdx,if=none,format=vhdx,id=sysdisk' -device 'virtio-blk-pci,drive=sysdisk,disable-legacy=on,disable-modern=off,iommu_platform=on' }
